items.name: flyto-core

items.name: mentedb
items.description: A cognition aware database engine for AI agent memory. Purpose built in Rust with WAL, HNSW, knowledge graphs, and speculative context pre assembly. Not a wrapper, a ground up storage engine that thinks.
